tasks.name: Clamp bugfix 11
tasks.prompt: mathutil.py has a bug in clamp. Fix clamp(x, lo, hi) so it returns max(lo, min(hi, x)). Do not rewrite unrelated files.

seed_files.mathutil.py:
def clamp(x, lo, hi):
    return max(lo, min(hi, x + 1))
